title: Certified Nursing Assistant (CNA)
description: Full-time CNA position. Day shift 7am-3pm, Mon-Fri. Assist patients with daily activities, monitor vital signs. CNA certification required.

title: Patient Care Technician
description: Evening shift patient care technician, 3pm-11pm. Rotating weekdays including some weekends. Assist nursing staff with patient care.

title: Medical Assistant
description: Outpatient clinic medical assistant. Day shift Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Phlebotomy, vitals, patient intake. Near Route 6 transit.

title: Production Associate
description: Assembly line production. Rotating shifts including night shift 11pm-7am and day shift 7am-3pm. Overtime available. Starting $18/hr.

title: Warehouse Associate
description: Night shift warehouse associate, 6pm-4:30am Thu-Sun. Pick, pack, and ship orders. Paid weekly, benefits day one.

title: Administrative Clerk
description: Day shift administrative clerk for city government. Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Data entry, filing, customer service. Background and credit check required.

title: Security Officer
description: Contract security officer. Day and evening rotating shifts. Must pass background check, credit check, and drug screening.

title: Cashier
description: Part-time and full-time cashier positions. Flexible scheduling, day and evening shifts available. Near Route 6 transit stop.

title: Stocker - Overnight
description: Overnight stocking position 10pm-7am. Unload trucks, stock shelves, organize backroom. Nights and weekends required.

title: Team Member
description: General merchandise team member. Morning and afternoon shifts available. Guest service, stocking, cashiering. Flexible schedule.

title: Cook
description: Line cook for local restaurant. Day shift 6am-2pm, Tuesday-Saturday. Southern cuisine experience preferred. Closed Sunday and Monday.

title: Fast Food Team Member
description: Day shift team member, Monday-Saturday 6am-2pm. Customer service and food prep. No Sunday work. Near bus stop on Eastern Blvd.

title: Maintenance Technician
description: Industrial maintenance position. Night shift 7pm-7am, rotating 3-4 day schedule. Electrical and mechanical troubleshooting. Credit check for facility clearance.

title: Home Health Aide
description: Home health aide providing in-home patient care. Day visits Monday-Friday, occasional Saturday. Must have reliable transportation or transit access.

title: Forklift Operator
description: Forklift operator for manufacturing warehouse. Day shift 6am-2:30pm with overtime. Forklift certification required or provided. Starting $19/hr.

title: Customer Service Representative
description: Bank teller / customer service representative. Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm, Saturday 9am-12pm. Credit check and background check required.

title: School Bus Driver
description: School bus driver, split shift: morning 5:30am-8:30am and afternoon 2pm-5pm. Monday-Friday during school year. CDL training provided.

title: Janitorial Staff
description: Janitorial position at state government complex. Evening shift 5pm-1am, Monday-Friday. State benefits included. Background check required.

title: Accounting Clerk
description: Entry-level accounting clerk. Day shift Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm. Data entry, invoice processing. Credit check required for financial position.

title: Delivery Driver
description: Package delivery driver. Day shift start 7am, Tuesday-Saturday including some Sundays during peak. Must have clean driving record.

title: Dietary Aide
description: Hospital dietary aide. Day shift 6am-2pm, rotating weekends. Prepare and deliver patient meals. Food handler certification preferred.

title: Receptionist
description: Front desk receptionist for mental health clinic. Monday-Friday 8am-5pm. Greet patients, schedule appointments, answer phones. Near Troy Highway transit.

title: Assembly Technician
description: Jet engine assembly technician. Day shift 7am-3:30pm with mandatory Saturday overtime during production peaks. Mechanical aptitude required.

title: Crew Member
description: Flexible schedule crew member. Morning, afternoon, evening, and overnight shifts available. Near Route 6 bus stop on E South Blvd.

title: Phlebotomist
description: Blood draw technician. Day shift Monday-Friday 7am-3pm, occasional Saturday morning. Phlebotomy certification required.

title: Landscaping Crew
description: Seasonal landscaping and grounds maintenance. Day shift 6am-2:30pm, Monday-Friday with Sunday work during special events. Outdoor physical work.

title: Call Center Agent
description: Inbound customer service agent. Day and evening shifts available. Monday-Saturday, no Sunday. Insurance industry, credit check for licensing.

title: Pharmacy Technician
description: Retail pharmacy technician. Rotating day shifts Monday-Sunday, 8am-8pm. Pharmacy tech certification preferred. Near Westgate transit area.
